Home / Services / Electrical Installation

Electrical Installation

Expert electrical installation services for new construction and renovations in Indianapolis.

Whether you're building a new home in Fishers or renovating a historic property in Fountain Square, 21 Electric provides expert electrical installation services to meet your needs. We understand the importance of a properly installed electrical system for safety, efficiency, and convenience.

Our team has extensive experience installing wiring, outlets, lighting fixtures, ceiling fans, and other electrical components in residential and commercial properties throughout Indianapolis. We stay up-to-date with the latest electrical codes and technologies to ensure your installation is safe, compliant, and future-proof. We also specialize in smart home installations, helping you integrate cutting-edge technology into your Indianapolis home.

From initial design to final inspection, we work closely with you to create an electrical system that meets your specific requirements and budget. Trust 21 Electric for reliable and professional electrical installation services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your electrical installation needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll develop a detailed plan and provide a comprehensive estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Our team will complete the installation efficiently and safely, adhering to all codes and regulations.
  4. 04 Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure everything is working properly and provide you with any necessary documentation.

Benefits

  • Code-compliant installations
  • Energy-efficient solutions
  • Customized designs
  • Professional workmanship

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of electrical installations do you handle?

We handle a wide range of electrical installations, including new wiring, lighting, outlets, ceiling fans, and smart home systems. We cater to both residential and commercial properties.

Do you obtain the necessary permits for electrical installations?

Yes, we handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure your electrical installation is fully compliant with local regulations.

How long does an electrical installation typically take?

The duration of an electrical installation depends on the scope of the project. We'll provide you with an estimated timeline during the consultation phase.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical installation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +17654446977
